title: Logix Smart Nasopharyngeal/Saliva Covid-19 PCR Prep (Station B)
author: Opentrons
description: Links: * [Logix Smart Nasopharyngeal Covid-19 Plating (Station A)](./313086) * [Logix Smart Nasopharyngeal/Saliva Covid-19 PCR Prep (Station B)](./313086-logixsmart-station-B) This protocol performs PCR prep in a NEST 96-well PCR plate. Samples with buffer pre-added should be arranged in a NEST 96-deepwell, and mastermix and controls should be loaded in 1.5ml microcentrifuge tubes in the Opentrons 4x6 tuberack. The transfer order is as shown below: ---
steps_raw: Links: * [Logix Smart Nasopharyngeal Covid-19 Plating (Station A)](./313086) * [Logix Smart Nasopharyngeal/Saliva Covid-19 PCR Prep (Station B)](./313086-logixsmart-station-B) This protocol performs PCR prep in a NEST 96-well PCR plate. Samples with buffer pre-added should be arranged in a NEST 96-deepwell, and mastermix and controls should be loaded in 1.5ml microcentrifuge tubes in the Opentrons 4x6 tuberack. The transfer order is as shown below: ---
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: NEST 2 mL 96-Well Deep Well Plate, V Bottom
Opentrons 24 tuberack with NEST 1.5 mL Microcentrifuge Tubes
NEST 0.1 mL 96-Well PCR Plate, Full Skirt
